title: oldenlandia lancea
intro: Oldenlandia lancea, a flowering plant native to Southeast Asia, is a type of herbaceous perennial that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Oldenlandia lancea include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve immune function. In herbal preparations, Oldenlandia lancea can be consumed as a tea or used in combination with other herbs to make infusions, extracts, and tonics, with caution and under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
